# CWE-78 positive: taint-tracked command injection (identifier flow)
lang: go
file: CWE-78-taint-vulnerable.go
variant: taint
---
package sample

import (
	"net/http"
	"os/exec"
	"path/filepath"
)

func RunCommand(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
	cmdName := r.URL.Query().Get("cmd")
	_ = exec.Command("sh", "-c", filepath.Clean(cmdName))
}
